rationale: Verified api_service/data/task_step_templates/jira-orchestrate.yaml has no remaining structural orchestrationMode field or template reference to inputs.orchestration_mode; there is no field in this file to hardcode.
Removed the redundant orchestrationmode entry from HIDDEN_PRESET_INPUT_KEYS after the Jira Orchestrate template input was deleted.
Removed orchestration_mode from downstream Jira Orchestrate task inputs and updated workflow boundary tests to assert the undeclared input is not emitted.
Addressed the actionable UI and workflow payload findings; verified the structural YAML concern does not apply to the current Jira Orchestrate template.
